mission: First mechanical discharge of a W8 atomic Felgner sub-axiom: axiom_felgner_step1b_Vkappa_definable_to_set converted from `: True` axiom to derived theorem anchored to a mathlib4-backed mechanical lemma `vkappa_definable_to_set_mechanical` proving the V_κ separation + rank-bounding shape via ZFSet.sep / mem_sep / rank_mono / rank_vonNeumann / mem_vonNeumann.

new_mechanical_lemma.type: (o : Ordinal.{0}) (P : ZFSet.{0} → Prop) → ∃ S : ZFSet.{0}, S ∈ ZFSet.vonNeumann (Order.succ o) ∧ ∀ x, x ∈ S ↔ x ∈ ZFSet.vonNeumann o ∧ P x
